# task\-dashboard\-frontend — Implement the dashboard SPA \(Vite \+ React \+ TanStack Query\)
status: done  priority: 2  scope: scope-core

Build the Vite \+ React SPA served by the dashboard Hono server\. Pages: Dashboard \(overview \+ next task \+ quick actions\), Tasks \(list \+ detail \+ brief \+ claim/release/finish\), Issues \(list \+ create\), Messages \(inbox\), Prompts \(list \+ render preview\), Validation \(results\)\. All data fetched via the API routes from task\-dashboard\-server; SSE for live updates\. Phase 5\.2 of docs/roadmap\.md\.

## Acceptance
- src/dashboard/client/ is a Vite project with @vitejs/plugin\-react configured\.
- React Router for client\-side routing: / \(Dashboard\), /tasks, /tasks/:id, /issues, /messages, /prompts, /validation\.
- src/dashboard/client/src/api\.ts wraps fetch\(\) with CommandResult envelope handling \(extract data, surface errors/warnings\)\.
- Dashboard page shows status counts, next ready task, and quick\-action buttons\.
- Tasks page lists all tasks with status/priority filters; clicking a task opens detail view\.
- TaskDetail page shows full task \+ brief \+ claim/release/finish actions\.
- Issues page lists issues and has a create form\.
- Messages page shows inbox for a given agent \(input field\) and a thread view\.
- Prompts page lists prompts and renders a selected prompt for a given task/agent context\.
- Validation page shows errors/warnings from validateLedger\.
- EventSource on /api/events triggers refetch of relevant data \(live updates\)\.
- Production build: \`vite build\` outputs to src/dashboard/client/dist/, Hono serves it\.
- Dev mode: \`waystation dashboard \-\-dev\` starts Vite HMR \+ Hono proxy\.
- typecheck, biome check, and \`waystation validate\` all clean; full \`bun test\` green\.
